name: Intel Core i5 12400F 12th Gen Processor
description: Intel Core i5 12400F 12th Gen Processor What is Intel Core i5 12400F 12th Gen Processor price in Pakistan? Intel Core i5 12400F 12th Gen Processor price in Pakistan is Rs.38,000. This efficient CPU offers 6 Performance cores and 12 threads with boost clock speeds up to 4.4 GHz, providing great performance for gaming and everyday tasks, and it requires a discrete GPU since it has no integrated graphics.
